description: Style note Crafted from soft cotton/lycra fabric, this medium coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with soft double layered cups that minimise show through and ensure a smooth look. An additional moon shaped panel gives extra support to the sides while the cut offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for tight fitting tees and tops. Product Details Made of breathable stretch cotton/lycra fabric for enhanced comfort Soft double layered cups that minimise show through and gives extra support to the sides for perfect shaping Beautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretch Printed label for abrasion-free comfort Material and Care Cotton lycra Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
